sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101348" key="suskeuasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συσκευ-ᾰσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n101348.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">packing up, getting ready</tr_>, for a journey or march, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0032.tlg007.perseus-grc1:4:2:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.2.35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
